stories: Good morning Sean, it's Monday, the twentieth of April, 2026
Twenty-one years on, more video gets added to YouTube every hour than any one person could watch in a lifetime
Not a bad trade for a trip to see some elephants
Looking at your day, you're still on Canadian hours out in Saskatoon
You've got a morning run pencilled in at seven, then an India-time forum session at eight, and after that a long focus block carved out from eight-twenty through to just before one
Heads up, Rahul is on leave today, so you're flying solo if anything lands in his court
Over in Singapore, a couple worth your attention
Oil is still up more than sixty percent since the conflict began, and Asia is feeling it
Good morning Sean, it's Sunday, the nineteenth of April, 2026
Here's a little fun to start the day: on this exact day back in 1987, The Simpsons first appeared on television â not as their own show, but as a scrappy animated short on The Tracey Ullman Show
Your calendar is looking clear today â a proper Sunday, no meetings pencilled in, so it's yours to spend as you like
Over in Singapore, two stories worth your attention
Singtel pointed the finger at on-site construction works disrupting all operators at once, a reminder of how much of the city's connectivity sits on shared infrastructure underground
Second, the Circle Line saga is winding towards a happier chapter
LTA and SMRT finished the three-month tunnel strengthening works nine days ahead of schedule, and they're now in final systems testing for the Circle Line Stage 6 opening
Services still end earlier on Saturday nights and start later on Sunday mornings through mid-May to allow for testing, so if you're planning an early ride today, the CCL doesn't run until nine
